process.commandLine: set -e; ls -la /mnt/c/workspace >/dev/null && echo 'PASS: filesystem mount visible' || { echo 'FAIL: /mnt/c/workspace not visible'; exit 1; }; cpus=$(nproc); echo "CPU_COUNT=$cpus"; [ "$cpus" = "2" ] && echo 'PASS: cpuCount enforced (nproc=2)' || { echo "FAIL: expected nproc=2, got $cpus"; exit 1; }; mem_kb=$(awk '/MemTotal:/ {print $2}' /proc/meminfo); mem_mb=$((mem_kb/1024)); echo "MEM_TOTAL_MB=$mem_mb"; [ $mem_mb -ge 820 ] && [ $mem_mb -le 1075 ] && echo 'PASS: memoryMb enforced (~1024MB, kernel-visible 80-105%)' || { echo "FAIL: expected 820-1075MB, got ${mem_mb}MB"; exit 1; }
